title: Question: Related to BLKANDNBLK error while linting
body:
---


Author Name: **Mehul Modhiya**
Original Redmine Message: 2180 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hello ,Everyone

While linting,i came across following errors

%Error-BLKANDNBLK:xxx.sv: Unsupported: Blocked and non-blocking assignments to the same variable:structure_name.object_of_structure

Verilator Document suggest that we can't mix blocking and non-blocking assignments,but system verilog permit it.

If i have one structure with 2 no. of elements and i am trying to access one element by assign statement(i.e blocking assignment) and other element by always_ff block(i.e non-blocking assignment) so While verilator linting i am getting the error mentioned above.

Also,if i am declaring structure in same module,then it works fine(i.e no error),but if i am declaring structure into other package file then it will give above error.

I have also attached .sv files. 

Could you please help me in this????
